Table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Card of table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Name

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Code

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_ADDRESS

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSTYPE AS ORDER_ADDRESS_TYPE_BK,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSID AS ORDER_ADDRESS_ID_BK,

COUNTRY AS COUNTRY_CODE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMERNO AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSEXTENSION1 AS ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSEXTENSION2 AS ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION_2,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_COUNTRY AS ORDER_COUNTRY_CODE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_CITY AS ORDER_CITY,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ZIP AS ORDER_ZIP_CODE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ZIPEXTENDED AS ORDER_ZIP_EXTENDED,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_STREET AS ORDER_STREET_NAME,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_STREETNO AS ORDER_STREET_NUMBER,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_BUILDING AS ORDER_BUILDING,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_FLOOR AS ORDER_FLOOR,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_STATE AS ORDER_STATE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_REGION AS ORDER_REGION,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_PROVINCE AS ORDER_PROVINCE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_POBOX AS ORDER_PO_BOX,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_PICKUPPOINTID AS ORDER_PICKUP_POINT_ID,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_COMPANY AS ORDER_COMPANY,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_DIGICODE AS ORDER_DIGICODE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_EMAIL AS CONSUMER_EMAIL,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_FIRSTNAME AS CONSUMER_FIRST_NAME,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_LASTNAME AS CONSUMER_LAST_NAME,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_SALUTATION AS CONSUMER_SALUTATION,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_LANGUAGE AS CONSUMER_LANGUAGE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_LATITUDE AS CONSUMER_LATITUDE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_LONGITUDE AS CONSUMER_LONGITUDE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_TELNO AS CONSUMER_TELEPHONE_NUMBER,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_BIRTHDAY AS CONSUMER_BIRTHDAY,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSTYPE,

FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSID,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_ADDRESS

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO, FULL_PAYLOAD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES_ADDRESSTYPE, full_payload_customer_addresses_addressId

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, ORDER_ADDRESS_TYPE_BK, ORDER_ADDRESS_ID_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

 

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.ORDER_COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

CKT_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

drop table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
ORDER_ADDRESS_TYPE_BK TEXT not null,
ORDER_ADDRESS_ID_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION TEXT,
ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION_2 TEXT,
ORDER_COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_CITY TEXT,
ORDER_ZIP_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_ZIP_EXTENDED TEXT,
ORDER_STREET_NAME TEXT,
ORDER_STREET_NUMBER TEXT,
ORDER_BUILDING TEXT,
ORDER_FLOOR TEXT,
ORDER_STATE TEXT,
ORDER_REGION TEXT,
ORDER_PROVINCE TEXT,
ORDER_PO_BOX TEXT,
ORDER_PICKUP_POINT_ID TEXT,
ORDER_COMPANY TEXT,
ORDER_DIGICODE TEXT,
CONSUMER_EMAIL TEXT,
CONSUMER_FIRST_NAME TEXT,
CONSUMER_LAST_NAME TEXT,
CONSUMER_SALUTATION TEXT,
CONSUMER_LANGUAGE TEXT,
CONSUMER_LATITUDE TEXT,
CONSUMER_LONGITUDE TEXT,
CONSUMER_TELEPHONE_NUMBER TEXT,
CONSUMER_BIRTHDAY TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_A primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, ORDER_ADDRESS_TYPE_BK, ORDER_ADDRESS_ID_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS set comment = 'This table contains address information linked to an order, such as country, street, street number and zip code.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ADDRESS_TYPE_BK is
'Type of the address selected for order delivery:

BillingAddress
PrimaryAddress
ShippingAddress';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ADDRESS_ID_BK is
'Address ID';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.COUNTRY_CODE is
'Country Code';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Full Payload Customer Customerno';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Time of the order creation';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION is
'additional address information';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ADDRESS_INFORMATION_2 is
'additional address information';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_COUNTRY_CODE is
'Country ISO code where the address resides';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_CITY is
'City of the shipping address';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ZIP_CODE is
'Postal code of the shipping address';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_ZIP_EXTENDED is
'Extended postal code of the shipping number';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_STREET_NAME is
'street provided for the order delivery';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_STREET_NUMBER is
'street number provided for the order delivery';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_BUILDING is
'additional address information';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_FLOOR is
'The floor number of the building';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_STATE is
'The ISO-3166-2 Code for State e.g. US-TN where the address resides';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_REGION is
'Region of the shipping address (if applicable)';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_PROVINCE is
'Province of the shipping address (if applicable)';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_PO_BOX is
'PO-Box of the shipping address (if applicable)';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_PICKUP_POINT_ID is
'Pickup-point identifier';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_COMPANY is
'Name of the company (if relevant), eg. Philip Morris GmbH, Phillip Morris Maldives.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ORDER_DIGICODE is
'Parameter related to the digicode';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_EMAIL is
'email of the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_FIRST_NAME is
'first name of the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_LAST_NAME is
'last name of the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_SALUTATION is
'Salutation selected by the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_LANGUAGE is
'Language of the consumer, 2-letter code';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_LATITUDE is
'The north-south coordinates of the address';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_LONGITUDE is
'The east-west coordinates of the address';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_TELEPHONE_NUMBER is
'phone number of the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_BIRTHDAY is
'Date of birth provided by the consumer';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

CKC_VALID_FROM_MDE_HYBR


Check of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Minimum Value

 

Maximum Value

 

Default Value

 

Unit

 

Format

 

Cannot Modify

No

Snowflake


Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

CKC_VALID_TO_MDE_HYBR

Column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ADDRESS
